items:
FULL NAME
Johannes Müller

ADDRESS
Sindelfingen, Germany

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Highly motivated and detail-oriented working student with a strong passion for Research and Development in Automated Driving and Driving Assistance Systems. Proficient in MS Office and familiar with Windows Operating System. Seeking a part-time position at Mercedes-Benz AG to apply theoretical knowledge in a real-world setting, supporting administrative activities, IT coordination, and contributing to the development of autonomous driving systems.

SKILLS
- Programming languages: C++, Python
- Development frameworks: Qt, ROS (Robot Operating System)
- Operating Systems: Windows 10, Linux
- Software tools: MS Office Suite, Git, SVN
- Familiarity with automotive software development environments
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

EDUCATION
Bachelor's/Master's degree in Computer Science or related field (expected completion date: 2028)

CURRENT STUDY PROGRAM
Automotive Technology at the University of Stuttgart (semester 2)

CERTIFICATIONS
- ITF certification
- Current certificate of enrollment stating semester and proof of standard period of study

FULL NAME
Amit Kumar Singh

ADDRESS
No. 12, 2nd Main Road, Bangalore - 560076

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Results-driven Research and Development Engineer with expertise in Brackets development, Design Data Analysis, and Change processes. Skilled in excellent interpersonal and communication skills with ability to build relationships and interact comfortably with all levels of management.

SKILLS
- Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills
- Strong cross-team collaboration and organizational skills
- Proficient in NX CAD design tools and aware of handling project requirements
- Good understanding of vehicle systems and sub-systems, assembly service process, and automotive product development process
- Knowledge of 2D/3D drawing required tolerance stack-up, manufacturability, durability testing experience
- Proactive problem solver with excellent communication skills
- German language proficiency (added advantage)
- Proficient in MS Office Suite

EDUCATION
B.E. Mechanical Automobile Industrial Production Engineering from Birla Institute of Technology, Ranchi - 2008
M.E. Mechanical Engineering from Indian Institute of Technology, Kanpur - 2010

WORK EXPERIENCE
Research and Development Engineer,
Mercedes-Benz Research and Development India Private Limited,
Bangalore (2022 - Present)

• Responsible for remote coordination of design data analysis and change processes
• Liaised with construction design engineers to confirm data correctness
• Maintained all required documentation in a central repository
• Managed risks and issues impacting project deliverables
• Collaborated with cross-functional teams, including suppliers, plant team, and other stakeholders
• Took complete ownership of tasks and followed up on ideas for innovation and customization
• Demonstrated competency improvement drive, collaboration across MBRD with BTVS, CAX, PDM, and MO Engineers
• Performed all tasks expected from Brackets Design Team and ensured satisfactory deliveries

Research Assistant,
Indian Institute of Technology, Kanpur (2010 - 2012)

• Assisted in designing and testing of automotive components
• Developed understanding of vehicle systems and sub-systems, assembly service process
• Collaborated with cross-functional teams to meet safety performance standards
• Prepared detailed manufacturing drawings and specifications

CERTIFICATIONS
None
